title: deschampsia cespitosa f. variegata
intro: Deschampsia cespitosa f. variegata, also known as variegated hair grass, is a type of ornamental grass characterized by its distinctive striped or variegated foliage. The medicinal properties of this plant include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of variegated hair grass include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Deschampsia cespitosa f. variegata can be used topically as a salve or infused in oils for application to the skin, or made into teas for internal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
